title: [ExportVerilog] Try harder with synthesized names
body:
We synthesize _T names when spilling things (e.g. due to multiple uses) and don't always have a pretty name available.  We should try harder in simple cases, e.g. like this:

`wire _T_0 = io_imem_bits_pc[1];`-> `wire _io_imem_bits_pc_1`

```
automatic logic [31:0] _T_29;     // IBuf.scala:38:24
_T_29 = `RANDOM;
```
-> `_RANDOM_42` 

etc.

All non-stable names should start with an underscore.
